items.title: Signing Reaves to a max would've taken some maneuvering for the Pistons.
items.author: Omari Sankofa II
items.body_excerpt:
Signing Reaves to a max would've taken some maneuvering for the Pistons. 

Cap space route would've been renouncing Harris, Huerter, Beasley, and Green in free agency, waiving Robinson and Reed, declining Tolu Smith's option and then trading either Stew or LeVert (likely Stew).

items.author: Mark Jones
items.body_excerpt:
The real subtle genius of the Kings front office led by GM Scott Perry is that he didn’t go for the pump fake. 

Both The Clippers and especially the Nets attempted to run misdirection and appear to be a threat to take Acuff. That would force Sacramento to try and move up to get their guy. 

Nope💯

items.title: Yaxel Lendeborg will be 24 before his first NBA game
items.author: Dalton Johnson
items.body_excerpt:
Yaxel Lendeborg will be 24 before his first NBA game 

OG Anunoby since his age-24 season (5 seasons, age-24 through 28 seasons): 16.8 ppg, 4.9 rpg, 2.2 apg, 1.6 spg, 47.4 FG%, 37.8 3P%, 80.6 FT%, 23.8 win shares

Those numbers sure do look like Yaxel Lendeborg numbers

items.title: As of right now, Austin Reaves will check in as the 16th highest-paid guard in the NBA next season. He's just behind Darius Garland & Ja Morant and just ahead of LaMelo Ball & Tyrese Maxey.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
As of right now, Austin Reaves will check in as the 16th highest-paid guard in the NBA next season. He's just behind Darius Garland & Ja Morant and just ahead of LaMelo Ball & Tyrese Maxey.

SGA is also just behind Reaves. This is the final season of his deal before his super max extension kicks in.
